data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: User decision time is minimized by reducing the number of choices on interfaces.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design influences cursor movement efficiency, optimizing target size and distance.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Interfaces are designed based on users’ familiar patterns from other applications.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic design promoting usability perceptions and user confidence.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements that are close to each other are perceived as more related than those spaced apart.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of icons and menu items
